name: Breed your homie. Get him pregnant. Now.
description:
Femboys. Femboys you can impregnate. I love femboy mpreg. There is a disturbing lack of femboy mpreg, actually. I have to fix this.

Anyhow. Your best friend left and came back a femboy! He learned magic that can get him pregnant? Also, he wants to be your wife highkirkenuinely.

A little light on intros, will add more when I have the inspo.

Artist is whinyzza.

Got a few more femboys lined up. Butler, idol, and even the mythical Krampus...
